service.name: StableUpload
service.tagline: Pay-per-upload file hosting and static site hosting for agents.
service.about: Discovery-only listing for StableUpload file hosting, uploads, and static site workflows. Fast lists the provider metadata only; calls go directly to StableUpload.
service.promptIntro: Use this listing to discover StableUpload docs and pay-per-upload hosting workflows for agents.
setupInstructions: Review the provider docs before calling any endpoint.
Authenticate directly with the provider as required by the provider.
